evidence_ns_cannot_see: What AĒR cannot fully see for this article
evidence_signal_edited_after_publication: edited after publication (paragraph or headline change)
evidence_signal_archive_history_unestabl: archive history could not be established (Wayback gap)
evidence_lookup_no_snapshots: No Wayback snapshots — the URL is not yet archived.
evidence_lookup_disabled: Wayback integration is disabled in this deployment.
evidence_lookup_none: No revision metadata recorded for this article.
evidence_diff_title_changed: Editorial change detected at this capture
evidence_diff_title_identical: Re-archival with no editorial change after extraction
evidence_sentiment_title: Sentiment change across this edit (later − earlier), multilingual backbone
evidence_shift_title: Semantic shift — E5 cosine distance between the two snapshot texts (0 = identical meaning)
evidence_shift_computing_title: Discourse-shift deltas are still being computed for this edit
evidence_no_editorial_changes_one: No editorial changes detected — unchanged across {count} archived capture{since}. Wayback re-archived the page, but the article body never changed after extraction.
evidence_no_editorial_changes_other: No editorial changes detected — unchanged across {count} archived captures{since}. Wayback re-archived the page, but the article body never changed after extraction.
evidence_no_editorial_steps: No editorial changes to step through — every archived capture parsed to identical content after extraction.
evidence_diff_being_computed: Diff is being computed; check back in a few minutes.
evidence_chain_head_note: Comparing the current article body to the most recent Wayback snapshot — answers "what has the publisher changed since the IA last archived this URL".
evidence_both_identical: Both snapshots parse to identical content after extraction. The Wayback Machine archived two captures with different file hashes but trafilatura recovers the same article body from each — likely just an HTTP re-fetch without an editorial change.
evidence_no_paragraph_changes: No paragraph-level changes detected between these snapshots.
evidence_no_wayback_snapshots: No Wayback snapshots are available for this article yet. The diff view becomes available once Wayback CDX captures the first snapshot.
evidence_metadata_not_found: Article metadata not found in the metadata store. The article still exists in the analytical layer (Gold) and aggregates remain valid, but the full text cannot be retrieved — most likely because PostgreSQL retention has pruned the document record while ClickHouse and MinIO retain longer. Article ID: {id}.
evidence_failed_to_load_with_status: Failed to load article (HTTP {status}). Check network connectivity.
evidence_failed_to_load: Failed to load article. Check network connectivity.
evidence_k_anonymity_note: The article is not accessible below the k-anonymity threshold (WP-006 §7). The observation exists in the Gold layer; the raw text is withheld to protect source-level attribution.
evidence_diff_tab_title_non_web: Diff view is only meaningful for web articles with a canonical URL.
evidence_diff_tab_title_no_snapshots: No Wayback snapshots — nothing to diff against.
evidence_diff_tab_title_view: View paragraph diff between current and archived snapshots
